pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly specify and check for this file path.
The environment setup script (setup_oracle_analytics.ps1) explicitly copies the source dataset to this exact directory.
Task instructions request a Map visualization (Choropleth/Filled Map) and verifier.py checks for map definitions within the DVA file.
Code analysis of the actual 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset reveals it only contains a 'City' column and no 'State' or 'Province' column, contradicting the task claim.
Code analysis of the actual 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset reveals it contains 'Sales' and 'Profit' columns, but no 'Revenue' column, contradicting the task claim.
verifier.py checks if the exported DVA file size is strictly greater than 5000 bytes.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the creation of a Map visualization (Choropleth) exported to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Revenue_Map.dva', using the 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\'. The final exported DVA file is verified to exist and be over 5000 bytes. However, while the task instructions request mapping 'State' to location and 'Revenue' to color, an inspection of the raw dataset reveals that it contains neither a 'State' column (only 'City') nor a 'Revenue' column (only 'Sales' and 'Profit'), contradicting the task metadata.
